subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 747163821/240904729 is not a GRB
body:
A. Trigg (LSU), report on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 747163821/240904729 at 17:30:16.37 UT
on 04 August 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
